risk_description: Incorrect approval rules route requests to the wrong reviewer or skip required finance/executive review
mitigation: Review approval matrix against BRULE-001 through BRULE-006 and validate low medium high emergency and capital expenditure scenarios during UAT
contingency: Pause affected routing path use manual approval tracking for impacted requests and log defect with project manager decision before restart

risk_description: User adoption resistance causes pilot users to keep submitting Maintenance requests through email or spreadsheets
mitigation: Send launch communication reinforce pilot scope in team huddles and monitor first-week request source counts
contingency: Redirect email/spreadsheet requests into the pilot workflow where practical and provide targeted follow-up training to repeat users

risk_description: Poor data quality in request fields limits approval finance procurement and reporting usefulness
mitigation: Use required fields controlled lists examples in training and daily review of incomplete submissions
contingency: Return incomplete requests for correction and update the quick reference guide with common examples

risk_description: Missing budget codes block normal submissions or create avoidable finance holds
mitigation: Prepare budget-code reference list before launch and include budget code guidance in requester training
contingency: Route unclear codes to finance support queue and track recurring missing-code patterns for training reinforcement

risk_description: Vendor master data issues cause procurement holds for unknown inactive duplicate or non-preferred vendors
mitigation: Prepare preferred vendor reference list and define minimum vendor information needed before PO readiness
contingency: Use procurement hold reason and manual vendor review until reference data is corrected or vendor exception is approved

risk_description: Delayed UAT sign-off leaves unresolved uncertainty before pilot launch
mitigation: Schedule UAT closeout review and document pass fail blocked defects and launch-impact decisions before go/no-go
contingency: Delay pilot launch or narrow pilot scope until critical scenarios have a documented decision

risk_description: Role access errors prevent requesters approvers finance procurement or report viewers from completing pilot tasks
mitigation: Perform role-based access smoke checks before launch for requester manager finance procurement UAT and report viewer roles
contingency: Use manual fallback for blocked users and escalate access correction as launch-critical issue

risk_description: Reporting mismatch reduces trust in dashboard views for holds approvals exceptions or receiving status
mitigation: Validate dashboard counts against the synthetic request extract and confirm refresh timing before go/no-go
contingency: Label reporting view as under review and use source extract checks during hypercare until issue is corrected

risk_description: Scope creep expands the pilot beyond Maintenance and emergency Safety examples before support is ready
mitigation: Confirm pilot boundary in rollout communication and defer Vessel Operations Logistics Administration IT and Finance request types to later expansion decisions
contingency: Route out-of-scope requests through existing process and log expansion requests for post-launch review

risk_description: Cutover confusion causes users to be unsure when to stop email/spreadsheet intake for pilot request types
mitigation: Issue clear launch-day instructions that define pilot request types support contacts and fallback rules
contingency: Send corrective communication and have procurement coordinator reconcile any duplicate email/spreadsheet requests

risk_description: Training completion gaps lead to incorrect submissions approvals or finance/procurement handling
mitigation: Track role-based training attendance and provide quick reference guide plus daily office hours during first week
contingency: Provide targeted refresher session for affected role and monitor related support questions

risk_description: Emergency purchase exception misuse weakens auditability or bypasses normal controls too often
mitigation: Train users that emergency safety is a fast-track path requiring justification approval history audit notes and finance visibility
contingency: Review emergency requests daily during hypercare and require correction or sponsor review for misuse

risk_description: Open high-severity defects before pilot launch create avoidable launch disruption
mitigation: Review DEF-001 DEF-002 and any other high-severity defects before go/no-go with resolution workaround or accepted-risk decision
contingency: Defer launch or remove affected scenario from pilot until defect owner confirms acceptable workaround

risk_description: Approval bottlenecks during first week delay purchase requests and reduce confidence in the workflow
mitigation: Monitor pending approvals over SLA daily and remind managers of approval queue ownership
contingency: Escalate overdue approvals to project manager and use manual approval note only if sponsor-approved fallback is needed
